zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Scudamore於1348年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Scudamore29歲，母親Lady Clarice Ewyas25歲。他和Agnes Huntercombe至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1419年12月9日在英國賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Scudamore于1348年出生在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Scudamore29岁，母亲Lady Clarice Ewyas25岁。他和Agnes Huntercombe至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1419年12月9日在英国賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Scudamore was born in 1348, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Scudamore, was 29 and his mother, Lady Clarice Ewyas, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Huntercombe. He died on 9 December 1419, in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Scudamore est né en 1348, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Scudamore, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Clarice Ewyas, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Huntercombe. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1419, à Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Scudamore 1348 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Scudamore 29 und seine Mutter Lady Clarice Ewyas 25. Er hatte mit Agnes Huntercombe mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Dezember 1419 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Scudamore è nato il nel 1348 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Scudamore, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Clarice Ewyas, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Huntercombe. Morì il 9 dicembre 1419, nel Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Scudamore(이)가 1348년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Scudamore(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Clarice Ewyas(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Agnes Huntercombe(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 12월 9일 영국 허퍼드실르 홀 레이시에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Scudamore nasceu em 1348, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Scudamore, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Clarice Ewyas, tinha 25 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Scudamore родился в 1348 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Scudamore было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Clarice Ewyas, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes Huntercombe. Он умер 9 декабря 1419 г. в местности холм ласи, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
